S1_avatar.notes: Excellent 90s yearbook conversion - laser background, authentic framing, 'DAVID K. LEE - Class of 98' text. Face likeness well maintained from selfie. Minor: name is fabricated (not derived from selfie), surrounding mini-photos are AI-generated filler.

S2_edit.notes: Denim jacket replacement successful - natural fit, background fully preserved. Minor: jacket style slightly generic, transition at neck/collar area could be smoother. Overall convincing local edit.

S3_poster.notes: All specified text rendered perfectly: UC Berkeley Music Society, Spring Auditions, Date April 15th, Location Sproul Hall Room 202, Time 6-9 PM. High-contrast gold/blue/black design. Professional layout with music motifs (notes, instruments). Even added a fictional URL and MUSIC SOCIETY logo. Exceptional result.

S4_character.notes: Obsidian armor with glowing purple energy veins - exactly as described. Heroic stance in tech-noir NYC ruins. Added creative details: energy sword, shield, cape, OSCORP/SHIELD/CYBERNETICS signage. Landscape orientation rather than portrait (concept art is usually portrait for full-body). Very rich detail.
